description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized atezolizumab in combination with nab-paclitaxel for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable locally advanced or metastatic triple-negative breast cancer whose tumors have PD-L1 expression >= 1% and who have not received prior chemotherapy for metastatic disease.

indication.indication: Tecentriq in combination with nab-paclitaxel is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable locally advanced or metastatic TNBC whose tumours have PD-L1 expression >= 1% and who have not received prior chemotherapy for metastatic disease.
